_comment: Auto-post body templates per alert source × severity. Loaded by AlertDispatchService at boot; editable without redeploy. Placeholders: {name}, {mag}, {distance}, {direction}, {duration}. Spec: docs/ALERTS_INTEGRATION.md 'Templates per source'.

templates.headline: Hurricane warning issued
templates.body: Hurricane {name} warning — hide flying objects, top up water, charge devices, review your evacuation plan.

templates.headline: Tornado warning issued
templates.body: Tornado warning — go to interior windowless room now.

templates.headline: Flash flood warning
templates.body: Flash flood warning — turn around, don't drown. Move to higher ground.

templates.headline: Flood warning
templates.body: Flood warning — move valuables up. Don't drive through water — turn around, don't drown.

templates.headline: Winter storm warning
templates.body: Winter storm warning — water/heat/food on hand. Watch for power loss; check on neighbors.

templates.headline: Blizzard warning
templates.body: Blizzard warning — stay off roads. Heat backup, food, water. Check on neighbors.

templates.headline: Excessive heat warning
templates.body: Excessive heat — hydrate, seek AC, check on elderly neighbors. Limit outdoor activity.

templates.headline: Fire weather warning
templates.body: Fire weather conditions — no outdoor burning. Pack go-bag in case evacuation is ordered.

templates.headline: Earthquake felt
templates.body: Earthquake felt — M{mag} epicenter {distance}mi {direction}. Check structure, gas, water.

templates.headline: Federal disaster declaration
templates.body: FEMA disaster declaration active in your area. Recovery resources available — see fema.gov/assistance.

templates.headline: Federal wildfire declaration
templates.body: FEMA wildfire declaration in your area. Recovery + assistance resources available — see fema.gov/assistance.

templates.headline: Federal disaster declaration
templates.body: FEMA disaster declaration active in your area. Recovery resources available — see fema.gov/assistance.
